# init(from:)

**Initializer**

Creates a new checkpoint by decoding from the decoder.

## Declaration

```swift
init(from decoder: any Decoder) throws
```

## Parameters

- **decoder**: The decoder to read data from.

## Encoding and decoding a checkpoint

- **encode(to:)**: Encodes the checkpoint into the encoder.

items.description: Encodes the checkpoint into the encoder.
items.name: encode(to:)
